ServiceCcc.quickAnswer: CCC (China Compulsory Certification / 中国强制性产品认证) is a mandatory product safety certification system administered by China's Certification and Accreditation Administration (CNCA). Products listed in the CCC Catalog — including electronics, household appliances, automotive parts, toys, safety glass, IT equipment, lighting products, and lithium-ion batteries (new 2025 category) — must undergo type testing at CNCA-designated laboratories and pass initial factory inspection before they can be legally imported or sold in China. Chinese customs enforces CCC compliance at the point of entry; non-compliant shipments may be detained, rejected, or subject to penalties. The certification mark must appear on the product and its packaging.
ServiceCcc.faq1a: CCC (China Compulsory Certification) is a mandatory product safety certification system managed by the Certification and Accreditation Administration of China (CNCA). It requires products in designated categories — including electronics, home appliances, automotive parts, toys, safety glass, IT equipment, lighting, and lithium-ion batteries — to undergo rigorous testing and factory inspection before they can be imported, sold, or used commercially in China. The system replaced the former Great Wall Mark and is enforced by Chinese customs at all ports of entry.
ServiceCcc.faq2a: Products listed in China's CCC mandatory certification catalog require certification before they can be imported, sold, or used commercially. The catalog currently covers 17 major categories including household appliances (refrigerators, air conditioners, washing machines), audio/video equipment, IT equipment (laptops, printers), lighting sources, automotive parts (tires, safety glass, seats), toys (electric, plastic, dolls), consumer electronics, power tools, and the newly added lithium-ion batteries (2025). We provide a free catalog assessment — simply send us your product specifications and we will confirm whether CCC certification applies.
ServiceCcc.faq3a: The typical CCC certification timeline is 8–12 weeks from application to certificate issuance, depending on product complexity and laboratory availability. The process includes: document review (1–2 weeks), product type testing at a CNCA-accredited laboratory (4–6 weeks), factory inspection (1 week preparation + on-site visit), and final certification review and approval (2–3 weeks). Certain products in the self-declaration (SDOC) scheme can be certified in 3–5 weeks. We manage the entire timeline and provide regular progress updates.
ServiceCcc.faq4a: Yes, overseas manufacturers can absolutely obtain CCC certification, but they must coordinate with CNCA-recognized testing laboratories and certification bodies in China. Key challenges include remote factory audit arrangements, sample shipping logistics, and communication with Chinese authorities in Mandarin. We act as your local China representative — managing all laboratory coordination, document translations, factory audit scheduling, and ongoing compliance. CNCA has recently introduced remote factory audit options for certain low-risk product categories.
ServiceCcc.faq5a: Yes, the China Compulsutive Certification system includes a Self-Declaration of Conformity (SDOC) pathway for certain low-risk product categories. Under SDOC, manufacturers can self-declare compliance with applicable GB standards and register with CNCA's designated platform, bypassing the full CCC certification process. Eligible categories include some types of IT equipment, LED lighting, and certain consumer electronics. SDOC significantly reduces both time and cost but still requires product testing at CNCA-accredited laboratories. We assess your product to determine if SDOC applies.
ServiceCcc.faq6a: CCC certificates are valid for 5 years and require annual factory surveillance inspections to maintain validity. Additional requirements include: periodic product testing to verify ongoing compliance, notification of any product design or manufacturing process changes to the certification body, and proper use of the CCC mark on products and packaging. We provide ongoing compliance monitoring, annual surveillance audit preparation, and management of any certificate renewals or modifications.
